english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 0]

arabic text: ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
english translation text:
This is the Book, there is no doubt in it, a guidance to the Godwary,
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 2]

arabic text: الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
english translation text:
who believe in the Unseen, maintain the prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them;
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 3]

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَا أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
english translation text:
and who believe in what has been sent down to you and what was sent down before you, and are certain of the Hereafter.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 4]

arabic text: أُولَٰئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
english translation text:
Those follow their Lord’s guidance and it is they who are the felicitous.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 5]

arabic text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا سَوَاءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ أَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
As for the faithless, it is the same to them whether you warn them or do not warn them, they will not have faith.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 6]

arabic text: خَتَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ ۖ وَعَلَىٰ أَبْصَارِهِمْ غِشَاوَةٌ ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
english translation text:
Allah has set a seal on their hearts and their hearing, and there is a blindfold on their sight, and there is a great punishment for them.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 7]

arabic text: وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَن يَقُولُ آمَنَّا بِاللَّهِ وَبِالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ وَمَا هُم بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
Among the people are those who say, ‘We have faith in Allah and the Last Day,’ but they have no faith.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 8]

arabic text: يُخَادِعُونَ اللَّهَ وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَمَا يَخْدَعُونَ إِلَّا أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ
english translation text:
They seek to deceive Allah and those who have faith, yet they deceive no one but themselves, but they are not aware.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 9]

arabic text: فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ اللَّهُ مَرَضًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْذِبُونَ
english translation text:
There is a sickness in their hearts; then Allah increased their sickness, and there is a painful punishment for them because of the lies they used to tell.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 10]

arabic text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَا تُفْسِدُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ قَالُوا إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُصْلِحُونَ
english translation text:
When they are told, ‘Do not cause corruption on the earth,’ they say, ‘We are only reformers!’
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 11]

arabic text: أَلَا إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ الْمُفْسِدُونَ وَلَٰكِن لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
english translation text:
Behold! They are themselves the agents of corruption, but they are not aware.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 12]

arabic text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ آمِنُوا كَمَا آمَنَ النَّاسُ قَالُوا أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَا آمَنَ السُّفَهَاءُ ۗ أَلَا إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ السُّفَهَاءُ وَلَٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
And when they are told, ‘Believe like the people who have believed,’ they say, ‘Shall we believe like the fools who have believed?’ Behold! They are themselves the fools, but they do not know.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 13]

arabic text: وَإِذَا لَقُوا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا قَالُوا آمَنَّا وَإِذَا خَلَوْا إِلَىٰ شَيَاطِينِهِمْ قَالُوا إِنَّا مَعَكُمْ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُسْتَهْزِئُونَ
english translation text:
When they meet the faithful, they say, ‘We believe,’ but when they are alone with their devils, they say, ‘We are with you; we were only deriding [them].’
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 14]

arabic text: اللَّهُ يَسْتَهْزِئُ بِهِمْ وَيَمُدُّهُمْ فِي طُغْيَانِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
english translation text:
It is Allah who derides them, and leaves them bewildered in their rebellion.
[Al-Baqarah – The Cow 2 : 15]
